name: Independence Day Flag Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------
FOR DECORATION
1/2 pint Blueberries
1 quart Small strawberries (of uniform size)
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Beat on high speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes.
3. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt; add alternately with water to butter mixture. Blend just until combined. Pour into prepared pan.
4. Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes; remove from pan. Cool completely on a wire rack. Place cake on an oblong serving tray or foil-covered cardboard.
5. Prepare Vanilla Buttercream Frosting and frost cake. Arrange blueberries in the upper left corner of the cake, creating a 4x5 inch rectangle. Arrange strawberries in rows for red stripes. Makes about 12 to 15 servings.
Vanilla Buttercream Frosting:
In a large bowl, combine powdered sugar and butter. Add milk and vanilla; beat until spreading consistency. About 2 cups.
